sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42270" key="e)reikhro\n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρεικ-ηρὸν</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κολλούριον</foreign> eye-salve <sense id="n42270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made with</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρείκη,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sever.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:103" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.103</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
